src: Go-MCP is a powerful Go(Golang) version of the MCP SDK that implements the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to facilitate seamless communication between external systems and AI applications.
ja: Go-MCP は Model Context Protocol (MCP) を実装した強力な Go(Golang) 版 MCP SDK で、外部システムと AI アプリケーション間のシームレスな通信を実現します。
